evidence.snippet:
INDUSTRIAL-GRADE RADIO CONTROL SYSTEMS
Rugged IP65 protected radio control solutions for UAV, USV and UGV applications.
NOVA USCT 4.3 Remote Control System - LikeAbird - Innovation Is Our Passion

items.notes: Flagship product is the NOVA USCT 4.3 rugged handheld GCS for UAV/USV/UGV VLOS and BVLOS operations, developed with HETRONIC

evidence.snippet:
BMS & POWER CONDITIONING
Modular custom smart battery management solutions for ground and remote vehicle use. Smart BEC, DC/DC, power distribution solutions and more...

items.notes: Dual Smart BMS and power conditioning products for ground and remote vehicle use

evidence.snippet:
DATA LINK ETHERNET DEVICES
Serial to ethernet gateways and switches for autopilot and flight controller connections over wireless, 4G/LTE, satcom data links and more...

REDUNDANT 4G/LTE ROUTERS
Local and centralized redundant 4G/LTE and Iridium satellite connectivity solutions for drone to cloud operations. Global M2M/IoT SIM cards and data plans...

items.notes: IP data link ethernet devices, redundant 4G/LTE routers, and SATCOM solutions for drone connectivity

evidence.snippet:
LikeAbird Ltd
Lordou Vyronos, 61-63
6023 Larnaca
Cyprus

LikeAbird specializes in the custom design and manufacture of innovative systems, products and solutions for the unmanned (air/land/sea) and robotic industry.  Our product line includes advanced industrial-grade radio control systems and ground stations, smart batteries and power solutions, Ethernet/IP and 4G/LTE connectivities .

### CUSTOM ENGINEERING
TAILORED TO INDIVIDUAL CUSTOMER NEEDS

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures rugged GCS, BMS/power systems, and IP/communications subsystems for UAV/USV/UGV. Partners with HETRONIC for the NOVA USCT GCS line; own-design BMS and ethernet gateway products.
